title: Ubiquiti E7 - UniFi Enterprise E7 UniFi Access Point
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise 7 is a device from the Enterprise series , designed for enterprise environments The UniFi E7 wireless access point is equipped with two Ethernet ports, both supporting PoE++ input power (1x GE + 1x 10GE) . With support for the 802.11be (WiFi 7) standard and tri-band WiFi 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz , it offers a total modulation rate of up to 20.8 Gbps * * Maximum modulation rate may vary depending on local regulatory conditions Up to 1000+ connected devices Tri-Band WiFi 7 1x GE + 1x 10GE (both with PoE support) for high availability installations Wireless Mesh, Fast Roaming, Band Steering Real-time spectral analysis Hotspot 2.0 Support for Radius over TLS UniFi Network Server version 9.2.87 or newer is required to manage the AP UniFi devices are centrally managed using the UniFi Network Server application. The application is available for download on Windows / Linux / macOS, or a standalone hardware controller can be purchased. The application is also included in selected UniFi routers Device Wall/Ceiling mount bracket Suspended ceiling tile bracket Suspended ceiling grid bracket Drilling template Mounting kit
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 + 6 GHz (triple band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Hotspot 2.0 Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 5760 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Transmission speed - 6GHz [Mb/s] 11520 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 30 Tx power 6GHz [dBm] 24 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 6GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 6, 5 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 100M/1G/10Gbps + (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 42 .. 57V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 43 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 50 Weight [g] 1800 Width [mm] 250 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 250
